ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the part */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimensions of the part */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part ID */,
  "net_price" REAL /* Net price of the part */,
  "price_list_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the price list ID */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the price */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the price (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the price entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the price entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_price_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_list_id") REFERENCES price_lists ("price_list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_lists" (
  "price_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the price list */,
  "price_list_name" TEXT /* Name of the price list */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the price list */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for which the price list is applicable */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the price list is applicable */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the item category */,
  "category_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the category set this item belongs to */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_classifications" (
  "fiscal_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal classification entry */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part associated with this classification */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item category this part belongs to */,
  "fiscal_code" TEXT /* Fiscal code for the classification */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable for the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_classifications_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_classifications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, pricing manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user login */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record where the change was made */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column where the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_list_versions" (
  "price_list_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price list version */,
  "price_list_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the price list ID */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the price list */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the price list version */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the price list version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_list_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_list_versions_price_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_list_id") REFERENCES price_lists ("price_list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_list_version_history" (
  "price_list_version_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price list version history entry */,
  "price_list_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the price list version ID */,
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing ID */,
  "price_list_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the price list ID */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the price list */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the price list version */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the price list version */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_list_version_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_list_version_history_pricing_id FOREIGN KEY ("pricing_id") REFERENCES pricing ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_list_version_history_price_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_list_id") REFERENCES price_lists ("price_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_list_version_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_list_version_history_price_list_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_list_version_id") REFERENCES price_list_versions ("price_list_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "price_list_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the price list ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_price_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_list_id") REFERENCES price_lists ("price_list_id")
)
